meta.title: Find Authorised Immigration Legal Help — SafePassage
meta.description: Find regulated solicitors, OISC advisers, and free legal aid organisations for asylum, work, student, family, and humanitarian visas.

pageSubtitle: All advisers shown here are regulated by the SRA, OISC, or are registered charities. Never use an unregulated immigration adviser.
noResults: No advisers match your filters. Try adjusting your search.

badges.label: SRA Regulated
badges.desc: Authorised and regulated by the Solicitors Regulation Authority

badges.label: OISC Registered
badges.desc: Registered with the Office of the Immigration Services Commissioner

badges.label: Registered Charity
badges.desc: UK-registered charity providing free or low-cost services

guideCtaTitle: Need the full pathway guide first?
guideCtaText: Read our detailed step-by-step guide before consulting a solicitor.
warningText: Using an unregulated immigration adviser is illegal and dangerous. Check that any adviser you use is listed on the SRA register or OISC register before paying any money.
